info.description: OpenAPI contract for the current OpenASE web control-plane surface.
info.title: OpenASE Frontend Contract API

provider_id.description: Agent provider ID used to run the agent.

requestBody.description: Update an agent definition request body.

config.description: Channel-specific configuration object submitted for this notification channel.

is_enabled.description: Whether the channel is enabled for delivery.

type.description: Notification channel type, such as slack or webhook.

requestBody.description: Update a notification channel request body.

context.description: Optional project, ticket, or workflow context attached to the chat turn.

project_id.description: Project ID supplied to ground the chat request.

ticket_id.description: Optional ticket ID supplied to ground the chat request.

workflow_id.description: Optional workflow ID supplied to ground the chat request.

message.description: User message content for the chat turn.

provider_id.description: Optional provider ID used to run this chat session.

session_id.description: Optional existing chat session ID to resume.

source.description: Source identifier for the chat request, such as web or cli.

requestBody.description: Start ephemeral chat request body.

parameters.description: Project ID that scopes the conversation list.
parameters.name: project_id

parameters.description: Optional provider ID used to filter conversations.
parameters.name: provider_id

project_id.description: Project ID that owns the conversation workspace and transcript.

provider_id.description: Provider ID used to run this persistent project conversation.

source.description: Project conversation source and currently must be project_sidebar.

requestBody.description: Create a project conversation request body.

parameters.description: Transcript entry ID for the action proposal.
parameters.name: entryId

200.description: Execute a project conversation action proposal response.

post.summary: Execute a project conversation action proposal

200.description: List project conversation transcript entries response.

answer.description: Structured answer payload for requestUserInput interrupts.

decision.description: Provider-native interrupt decision identifier such as approve_once.

requestBody.description: Respond to a project conversation interrupt request body.

200.description: Respond to a project conversation interrupt response.

post.summary: Respond to a project conversation interrupt

delete.summary: Close a project conversation live runtime

message.description: User message content appended as the next project conversation turn.

requestBody.description: Start a project conversation turn request body.

202.description: Start a project conversation turn response.

auth_token.description: Connector-scoped auth token. Leave blank to fall back to project GitHub credentials when supported.

auto_workflow.description: Optional workflow binding associated with imported tickets.

base_url.description: Optional API base URL override for self-hosted or test endpoints.

exclude_labels.description: Labels that should exclude an issue from import.

labels.description: Labels required for an issue to be imported.

poll_interval.description: Pull sync interval encoded as a Go duration string such as 5m.

project_ref.description: External repository or project reference, for example owner/repo.

status_mapping.description: Map of upstream statuses to internal project ticket statuses.

sync_direction.description: Sync policy. Supported values are bidirectional, pull_only, and push_only.

webhook_secret.description: Optional shared secret used to validate inbound webhook deliveries.

name.description: Human-readable connector name shown in Settings.

status.description: Runtime connector state. Supported values are active, paused, and error.

requestBody.description: Update an issue connector request body.

200.description: Get connector runtime stats and last sync details response.

get.summary: Get connector runtime stats and last sync details

200.description: Trigger a manual connector pull sync response.

200.description: Run a connector health check response.

content.description: Harness content to write or validate.

requestBody.description: Validate workflow harness content request body.

200.description: List the harness variable dictionary response.

agent_cli_path.description: Absolute path to the agent CLI executable on the machine.

env_vars.description: Environment variable entries exported when work runs on the machine.

host.description: Hostname or address used to reach the machine.

labels.description: Labels attached to the machine for operator reference.

port.description: SSH port used to connect to the machine.

ssh_key_path.description: Path to the SSH private key used for machine access.

ssh_user.description: SSH username used for machine access.

workspace_root.description: Filesystem root directory where ticket workspaces are created on the machine.

requestBody.description: Update a machine request body.

content.description: Skill markdown content. Frontmatter is optional on input and will be normalized on write.

icon.description: Display icon identifier for the status.

is_default.description: Whether this status should become the default status.

max_active_runs.description: Maximum number of active runs allowed in this status.

position.description: Zero-based display order of the status.

stage.description: Lifecycle stage for the status. One of backlog, unstarted, started, completed, or canceled.

created_by.description: Actor identifier recorded as the creator of the ticket.

external_ref.description: Optional external reference string associated with the ticket.

parent_ticket_id.description: Optional parent ticket ID for hierarchical ticket relationships.

repo_scopes.description: Optional repository scopes attached at ticket creation time. Multi-repo projects must supply explicit repo scopes; single-repo projects auto-select the only repo when omitted.

branch_name.description: Optional branch name for the scoped repository checkout. When omitted, the repository default branch is used.

status_id.description: Optional ticket status ID to assign explicitly.

workflow_id.description: Optional workflow ID that should handle the ticket.
